---
title: 'Job&#39;s Wealth. Calculating the Wealth of Job and Converting it to modern currency.'
date: '2014-05-07T04:48:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2376759429366618689'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/job-wealth-calculating-wealth-of-job.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Job Research'
  - 'Job'
---

<b>Jobs Wealth:</b><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/job/1.html" target="_blank">Job 1:3</a></i><br /><div><i>Also, his possessions were seven thousand sheep, three thousand camels, five hundred yoke of oxen, five hundred female donkeys, and a very large household, so that this man was the greatest of all the people of the East.</i></div></blockquote><br /><br /><br /><br /><ul><li>7,000 Sheep</li><li><br /></li></ul><ul><li>3,000 Camels</li></ul><ul><li>500 Yoke (That's a pair so 1,000) Oxen</li></ul><ul><li>500 Female Donkeys</li></ul><ul><li>And a VERY large household (indicating lots of servants/employees), Greatest man in all the people of the East.&nbsp;</li></ul><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Special Thanks To:<br /><br />* I started doing a search for cost of livestock, sheep, etc. I found a whole lot of confusing terms but no straight answers.<br /><br />During my research I found&nbsp;<a href="http://www.sheep101.info/" target="_blank">http://www.sheep101.info</a>. There was a link to Email George so I did!<br /><br />I also sent a message to the <a href="https://www.facebook.com/HasletFeedandOutdoors?ref=hl" target="_blank">Haslet Feed and Outdoors</a>. Since they are local to me. See if they have any ideas.
